hero.title: A Vision for Progress, Integrity & Change

intro.body: Welcome to our official campaign portal. Our mission is to build a prosperous, inclusive, and highly developed Bar Association. Devendra Pratap Singh stands as a beacon of progress and transparency. Together, let us shape a better tomorrow.

search.title: Constituent Directory Search
search.subtitle: Search your record in the voter and candidate directory by full name, phone number, or enrollment ID.
search.placeholder_all: Enter name, phone, or enrollment number...
search.empty: No results found. Try adjusting your query or filters.

banner.slogan: Your Vote, Your Future. Let's Vote for Progress!
